name: Succession and Relocation of Special Tax Status

eligibility.description: Applies to businesses subject to special taxes (like wagering). Successors or relocating owners must register the change with the Secretary to maintain the tax-paid status.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a spouse, child, or legal representative to continue a business after the taxpayer's death, or a taxpayer to move a business location, without paying additional special taxes for the remainder of the term.
